svg.title: 3D Exhibit Studio, final hub architecture
svg.desc: The complete architecture. Cowork is the hub, a dashed container wrapping six pipeline stages: brief, assets, narrative, prompts, clips, assembly. Four reference lenses on the left feed design judgement into the brief, narrative, prompts and assembly stages. Higgsfield MCP on the right generates the clips. Assembly branches into two delivery paths: slides via the PowerPoint agent and a web link via the Netlify MCP.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens in the brief stage?')
sendPrompt('What assets go into the studio?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the narrative stage?')
sendPrompt('How does the re-roll loop work?')
sendPrompt('How do I choose between slides and web?')
sendPrompt('How do Boyd and Alexander inform the brief?')
sendPrompt('How do Ching and Scarpa shape each scene?')
sendPrompt('How do Zumthor and Best inform the style lock?')
sendPrompt('How does the substance check gate assembly?')
sendPrompt('How does Higgsfield MCP generate clips?')
sendPrompt('How does the PowerPoint agent build the deck?')
sendPrompt('How does the Netlify deploy work?')
